text.title: Tweet Thread Launch Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a demo gif (<30s) AND a consented social-proof quote AND final pricing on file?

branch.conclusion: Produce 7-tweet spec per canonical shape; schedule for launch.
Pause launch; run 3 hook variants in low-stakes posts 7 days pre-launch.
Skip this methodology. Gather demo gif + consented quote + final price first.

text.example: gif=30s_demo.mp4 quote='cut deploy 12→1.5min' consent=2026-05-18 hooks=[a,b,c] tested → produce 7-tweet spec per r1.
